summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 4 features: UI image updates, stats section white text, fleet updates, logo display, and SMTP admin settings. All backend APIs (15/15) pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status
API root returns SkyLine Media branding with CAD currency
Admin login with valid credentials (isaacsarver100@gmail.com)
Admin login rejects invalid credentials
GET /api/admin/settings returns SMTP fields (smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, sender_email)
GET /api/admin/settings requires authentication (401 without token)
PUT /api/admin/settings accepts and persists SMTP configuration
PUT /api/admin/settings requires authentication
POST /api/admin/test-email returns mock status when SMTP not configured
POST /api/admin/test-email requires authentication
GET /api/packages returns correct fleet (Mavic 3 Pro, Air 3, Avata 2) with CAD pricing
GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats with CAD currency
GET /api/admin/bookings returns booking list
GET /api/admin/clients returns client list
GET /api/admin/contacts returns contact list
Home page hero section renders with warm sunset image
Stats section displays 500+, 50+, 24hr, 100% with WHITE text on dark background
About/Transport Canada section shows compliance-image.png (DJI Mavic 3 Pro close-up)
Equipment section shows equipment-image.png (drone/earth/law graphic)
Our Fleet lists DJI Mavic 3 Pro, DJI Air 3, DJI Avata 2 with correct specs
Header displays new logo.png (SkyLine Media golden peaks)
Footer displays new logo.png
Services page equipment section lists updated fleet with specs
Admin dashboard sidebar shows 'SkyLine Media' branding (fixed from previous iteration)
Admin Settings page loads with SMTP configuration fields
Admin Settings Save button works (shows success toast)
Admin Test Email button works (shows mock mode toast when SMTP not configured)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified working: (1) equipment-image.png in Equipment section, (2) compliance-image.png in Transport Canada section, (3) Stats section has white text on dark background, (4) Fleet updated to Mavic 3 Pro, Air 3, Avata 2 with specs, (5) New logo.png in header/footer, (6) SMTP config in admin settings with test email endpoint. Email notifications are MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured. Toast shows 'Email is currently in mock mode. Configure SMTP settings to send real emails.'
